title: Trials & Tournaments Modpack
description: The official modpack for the Trials & Tournaments Minecraft server. This pack provides opimizations, QoL reworks, new items and features, and other miscellaneous mods.
body:
The official modpack of the Trials & Tournaments Minecraft server. This is a jack of all trades sort of modpack, adding many different features to the game, aiming to spice up the overall experience a bit. Some things that this modpack adds include:

 -Optimization mods, such as Sodium and Lithium, to improve client performance.
 
 -QoL mods to improve and/or add features relating to the game.
 
 -General mods to add new biomes, structures, items, etc.

 -Extra customization, such as the ability to dye elytras, change the totem model to a player bu renaming it, and put banners on beds.

#  Server
This modpack is intended for use solely with the official Trials & Tournaments Minecraft server, which you can find [here](https://discord.gg/VQvAP4fMSw). You can also use this modpack for any of your own servers, in case you want to start your own server with this pack. Just keep in mind you will have to add each server-side and client-server mod to be able to use it.
